---
title: "roylib.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mh1-processor.html)

Shared GCS helpers, NASA API queries, and processing utilities.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/mh1-mpoc-mpic-processor/src/roylib.py >}}
```

:::
